creator: ernst@jollem.com
text:
Added port version in post-install output message
	Installing startup script in ${PREFIX}/etc/rc.d/
	Removed ${RECURSIVE_CP} in favour of just a ${CP} -R
	Stopped using PLIST_SUB in favour of using plist-builder for pkg-plist

Fix: First of all the diff file for the Makefile and below that a new shar
	file, since the new pkg-plist file has changed completely. The other
	files have not changed. The PORTREVISION has been set to 1.

How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
